sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50222" key="i)qu/tonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰθύ-τονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,= <sense id="n50222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰθυτενής, στάλικες</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.187</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alph.</author> </bibl>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">-τενῶν</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
